title: reconcile in-flight archive reservations before PR gates
rawUserRequest: 当发现 CI/PR/发布被流程问题挡住时，必须停止后续发布和重复重试，先从根本上改善流程；本次 archiveGrowth=489 超过 488 的阻断要修正预算与在途工单的时序协调，并完成完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程。

declaredIntent.summary: 将预算闸门从单纯检查当前树绝对值，提升为可解释、可审计地协调已冻结但尚未并入默认分支的归档增长；保留旧证据，避免靠重复改上限绕过流程。

outOfScope: Starting or reordering plan Work Items
Modifying immutable archived Contracts or Summaries

sources.reason: Current archiveGrowth ceiling and repayment records expose the absolute-budget failure.
PR complexity gate that currently rejects an explainable in-flight archive transition.
Pre-archive reservation gate introduced by the preceding corrective Work Item.
Regression tests for archive reservation behavior.
Frozen pre-gate Work Item that exposed the in-flight reservation gap.

riskAssessment.reason: Changing budget gate semantics can affect PR admission; preserve fail-closed behavior and immutable evidence.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized stopping release and correcting the process root cause before retrying the PR.

preReviewWarnings: Do not solve the observed overage by an undocumented limit bump; require explicit reconciliation evidence for legacy in-flight archives.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The budget gate has an explicit, tested reconciliation path for a frozen archive created before the pre-archive reservation gate merged.
The current archiveGrowth=489 transition is represented by an auditable policy reservation with owner, date, and repayment rationale; no immutable evidence is rewritten.
A regression test proves ordinary stale or unreserved growth remains fail closed.
PR preflight passes formatter and governance budget checks before the corrective PR is opened.
guidelines: Fail closed for unreserved or ambiguous archive growth.
Template repository only; do not transplant template budgets into adopter projects.
Do not modify immutable archived evidence.

intent.problem: The new pre-archive gate reserved archiveGrowth=488 for its own archive, but an already-frozen release_archive_boundary_v1 archive was created on the prior base and is now included when its branch is rebased. check-ai-pr therefore reports 489>488 after the process correction, blocking the next PR and exposing an in-flight lifecycle reservation gap.
constraints: Stop release and PR retries until the process correction is complete.
Preserve immutable archive evidence and the full Work Item lifecycle.
Keep normal over-budget and stale reservation cases fail closed.
Separate template governance policy from adopter runtime policy.
intent.rationale: A bounded, explicit reconciliation path makes the exceptional pre-gate transition auditable while ensuring future Work Items reserve growth before mutation and cannot silently exceed the policy.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized stopping release and correcting the root governance process before retrying PR/release gates.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

evidence: observed check-ai-pr failure: archiveGrowth=489 exceeds configured maximum 488
